hemoglobin.name: Hemoglobin (Hb)
hemoglobin.low_means: Anemia, iron deficiency, blood loss, bone marrow issues
hemoglobin.high_means: Polycythemia, dehydration, lung disease, living at high altitude
hemoglobin.prevention_low: Eat iron-rich foods (spinach, red meat, lentils), take Vitamin C for absorption
hemoglobin.prevention_high: Stay hydrated, avoid smoking, consult hematologist

wbc.name: White Blood Cells (WBC)
wbc.low_means: Weak immune system, bone marrow problems, viral infections, autoimmune disorders
wbc.high_means: Active infection, inflammation, leukemia, stress response, allergic reaction
wbc.prevention_low: Boost immunity with Vitamin C, zinc, proper sleep, avoid infections
wbc.prevention_high: Treat underlying infection, reduce stress, consult doctor immediately

rbc.name: Red Blood Cells (RBC)
rbc.low_means: Anemia, nutritional deficiency, chronic disease, blood loss
rbc.high_means: Polycythemia vera, dehydration, heart disease, kidney tumors
rbc.prevention_low: Iron and B12 supplementation, balanced diet, treat underlying cause
rbc.prevention_high: Stay hydrated, regular check-ups, avoid smoking

platelets.name: Platelets
platelets.low_means: Dengue fever, liver disease, leukemia, viral infections, medication side effects
platelets.high_means: Iron deficiency, infection, inflammation, bone marrow disorder
platelets.prevention_low: Avoid injury risk, eat papaya leaf extract, consult hematologist urgently
platelets.prevention_high: Treat underlying infection, stay hydrated, regular monitoring

fasting_glucose.name: Fasting Blood Glucose
fasting_glucose.low_means: Hypoglycemia, excess insulin, liver disease, adrenal insufficiency
fasting_glucose.high_means: Diabetes mellitus, pre-diabetes, stress, medication effects
fasting_glucose.prevention_low: Eat regular meals, carry glucose tablets, monitor blood sugar
fasting_glucose.prevention_high: Low-sugar diet, exercise, weight management, consult endocrinologist

hba1c.name: HbA1c (Glycated Hemoglobin)
hba1c.high_means: Poorly controlled diabetes, increased risk of complications
hba1c.prevention_low: Monitor blood sugar, adjust medication with doctor
hba1c.prevention_high: Strict blood sugar control, exercise, diet management, regular monitoring

cholesterol_total.name: Total Cholesterol
cholesterol_total.high_means: Heart disease risk, atherosclerosis, stroke risk
cholesterol_total.prevention_high: Low-fat diet, exercise, avoid fried foods, omega-3 fatty acids

ldl.name: LDL Cholesterol (Bad)
ldl.high_means: Increased risk of heart attack and stroke, artery blockage
ldl.prevention_high: Exercise, reduce saturated fats, eat fiber, medication if needed

hdl.name: HDL Cholesterol (Good)
hdl.low_means: Increased heart disease risk, metabolic syndrome
hdl.high_means: Generally protective, very high may need evaluation
hdl.prevention_low: Exercise regularly, eat healthy fats (olive oil, nuts, fish)
hdl.prevention_high: Usually beneficial, monitor with lipid panel

triglycerides.name: Triglycerides
triglycerides.high_means: Heart disease risk, pancreatitis risk, metabolic syndrome
triglycerides.prevention_high: Reduce sugar, limit alcohol, exercise, omega-3 supplements

alt.name: ALT (Alanine Aminotransferase)
alt.high_means: Liver damage, hepatitis, fatty liver, medication toxicity
alt.prevention_high: Avoid alcohol, reduce fatty foods, check medications with doctor

ast.name: AST (Aspartate Aminotransferase)
ast.high_means: Liver damage, heart damage, muscle injury, hepatitis
ast.prevention_high: Avoid alcohol, protect liver, consult gastroenterologist

bilirubin_total.name: Total Bilirubin
bilirubin_total.high_means: Jaundice, liver disease, bile duct obstruction, hemolytic anemia
bilirubin_total.prevention_high: Treat liver disease, stay hydrated, consult hepatologist

creatinine.name: Creatinine
creatinine.high_means: Kidney disease, kidney failure, dehydration, high protein diet
creatinine.prevention_high: Stay hydrated, reduce protein intake, avoid NSAIDs, consult nephrologist

bun.name: BUN (Blood Urea Nitrogen)
bun.high_means: Kidney disease, dehydration, heart failure, high protein diet, GI bleeding
bun.prevention_high: Stay hydrated, manage blood pressure, consult nephrologist

tsh.name: TSH (Thyroid Stimulating Hormone)
tsh.low_means: Hyperthyroidism, Graves disease, excess thyroid medication
tsh.prevention_high: Iodine-rich diet (iodized salt), medication (levothyroxine), regular monitoring

vitamin_d.name: Vitamin D (25-OH)
vitamin_d.low_means: Bone weakness, osteoporosis risk, fatigue, depression, weak immunity
vitamin_d.high_means: Vitamin D toxicity, kidney damage, calcium buildup
vitamin_d.prevention_low: Sunlight exposure 15-20 min daily, Vitamin D supplements, fortified foods

uric_acid.name: Uric Acid
uric_acid.high_means: Gout, kidney stones, kidney disease, high purine diet
uric_acid.prevention_high: Reduce red meat, avoid alcohol, drink plenty of water, limit seafood

esr.name: ESR (Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate)
esr.high_means: Infection, inflammation, autoimmune disease, cancer, tissue injury
esr.prevention_high: Identify and treat underlying cause, anti-inflammatory diet

iron.name: Serum Iron
iron.low_means: Iron deficiency anemia, chronic blood loss, poor absorption
iron.prevention_low: Iron-rich foods, Vitamin C for absorption, iron supplements
iron.prevention_high: Avoid iron supplements, regular phlebotomy if needed, consult doctor
